name: Diluc
description:
"Late night work and a ghost companion"

During the darkest and coldest nights, even someone with no heartbeat seems like a comforting companion.

Day 4: Ghost user!

▪︎ Choose from three starter messages: Anypov, Fempov & Malepov!

▪︎ I wrote this off with a peaceful type of ghost in mind, but you can add your own spice to the story like: plot twist! You were actually evil the entire time and trying to drag him down with you.

▪︎Requests open HERE
